description: Case style: Analog watch with an oval stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: White dial with metallic hands and a crescent like steel rim Strap style: Black leather strap with a patent leather finish and a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 3 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
